items.summary:
Over at Amazon you can find the popular EGO Power+ 56V 15-inch Cordless Electric POWERLOAD String Trimmer with a 2.5Ah battery down at $179 shipped. Usually going for $219 at full price, since October’s Prime Day event we saw consistent discounts repeating to $199 until late April when it went lower to $179, where it’s been keeping aside from a short drop to $175 right at the end of that month. The deal here is a continuing $40 markdown that gives you one of the brand’s more affordable string trimmers at the second-best price we have seen since early October. You’ll find many more of EGO’s tool deals by heading to the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: This ultra-slim 10K MagSafe power bank can charge both your iPhone and Apple Watch, now just $23 for Memorial Day
items.summary:
LISEN 0.5-inch ultra-slim 10,000mAh MagSafe Power Bank

Buy for $23 (Reg. $40)

Apply 6QV25C85 during checkout.

What we love

One of the standout features of this power bank is its ultra-slim 0.5-inch profile. Despite its compact design, it still manages to fit a sizable 10,000mAh battery alongside a Qi2-certified 15W wireless charging pad for convenient iPhone top-ups. If you need quicker charging speeds, you can also use the integrated USB-C cable, which supports up to 20W output. Another handy addition here is the built-in Apple Watch charger, giving you an easy way to power up your watch while you’re out and about.

You can score the digital version of this one on the eShop at a regular $30, but the boxed copy is now even lower anyway. “Master fluid, acrobatic, and responsive combat, paired with challenging parkour. Death after death, forge your own playstyle – through exploration and encounters, perhaps you’ll find a way to right your wrongs and save the Persian kingdom envisioned by Evil Empire.”

items.title: Amazon undercuts Hiboy’s sale by offering the 40-mile traveling S2 Max e-scooter at $495 (Best price since October)
items.summary:
Amazon is undercutting Hiboy’s direct Memorial Day Sale when it comes to the pricing on the S2 Max Electric Scooter down at $494.90 shipped, beating its direct website pricing by $95. This commuter-ready e-scooter carries an $835 MSRP direct from Hiboy, but at Amazon we haven’t seen it climb past $590 in 2026, while 2025 only saw it go as high as $650. It has spent much of 2026 discounted down at $495, and while we have seen it fall a little lower in the past, you’re still getting a $95 markdown off the going rate ($155 off the 2025 going rate and $340 off the MSRP) for the best price we have tracked since October’s Prime Day event. You can also find several more Hiboy e-scooters and e-bikes benefiting from Memorial Day discounts in our original coverage here.
